expectations.evidence: Detailed explanation of mergeMarkdownSections(): 'Unchanged sections (matching sectionHashes) are updated to latest plugin content; Edited sections (hash mismatch) are preserved as-is; New plugin sections are appended; Local-only sections are kept.' 14 of 15 files use markdown-sections mode.

Explains loading project.json from '.claude/try-claude/project.json', reading managedReferences into a Map, writing updated project.json with new timestamps and hashes. Shows projectJsonPath in simulated output.

States '15 managedReferences entries tracked', describes the full sync workflow comparing plugin reference files against repo-local copies, and shows simulated output with trackedCount: 15 and all 15 file actions.

eval_feedback.overall: Excellent result. The with_skill run provided a thorough, structured analysis of the migration skill behavior including detailed merge mode explanations, project.json tracking, and a complete simulated output. Responded well to the Korean-language prompt.
